case_title: JATEEN BHATT VS. XIVERTI LLC, A GEOGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHATT, JATEEN AS TO DEFENDANT XIVERTI LLC, A GEOGIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
